---
title: "Panjiva"
page-layout: article
---

# Panjiva

## Description

Global trade database with import and export records, suppliers, buyers, products, and shipment trends. Supports supply chain, trade, and sourcing research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** General Research
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUNUxHUEEyOEI4WDNRRVhJMzI3SVA1M01QQyQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
